versions.promoText: Tohle HOPI ještě nevidělo. Claude AI je živý v AppIQ. Teď hned. Zeptej se.
versions.promoTextEn: HOPI has never seen this. Claude AI is live in AppIQ. Right now. Ask it.

versions.title: CEO Brief, MIND-SET REVOLUTION, page split + music

versions.promoText: Svět se zatřásl. CEO Brief, MIND-SET REVOLUTION a živá bomba jsou tady.
versions.promoTextEn: The world shook. CEO Brief, MIND-SET REVOLUTION and the live bomb are here.
